eligible_applicant_type: 501(c)(3) nonprofit organizations based in Rhode Island
Groups fiscally sponsored by a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization based in Rhode Island

Out-of-state organizations with principal place of business in Rhode Island, registered with the R.I. Secretary of State, producing programming predominantly in Rhode Island, and governed by a Rhode Island-based board
project_area: Arts and culture projects relevant to Rhode Island communities
demographic_requirements: Programs that engage underserved communities as defined by the NEA are particularly suitable.
eligibility_summary: Open to Rhode Island-based 501(c)(3) nonprofits or fiscally sponsored groups. Out-of-state organizations must meet specific Rhode Island-based criteria. Projects must be discrete, not part of a larger season, and occur in ADA-compliant spaces. Organizations must not be delinquent on prior reports or receiving conflicting RISCA grants.
